item.title: Low-Miles '98 Trans Am Repair Costs
item.description: A low-mileage 1998 Trans Am still needs thousands in repairs. A practical look at what it may take to get it road-ready.

item.title: Why Low Mileage Doesn't Mean Reliable
item.description: A practical look at why low mileage alone doesn’t guarantee reliability, with helpful context for diagnostics, maintenance, and ownership decisions.
